data.title: Trump Projects Confidence on Iran War While China Stays Cautious
data.description: President Donald Trump said the US and China share common goals for ending the Iran war, while Beijing struck a measured tone in urging further diplomacy.
data.keywords: Donald John Trump,Iran,China,War,Beijing,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Tehran,Xi Jinping,Israel,Generic 1st 'NG' Future,politics
